title: You Are the Apple of My Eye
posterAlt: You Are the Apple of My Eye (2025) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A group of close friends who attend a private school all have a debilitating crush on the sunny star pupil, Sun-ah. The only member of the group who claims not to is Jin-woo, but he ends up loving her as well.
synopsis: You Are the Apple of My Eye is a 2025 romance, drama and comedy film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.6 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a ATP certification (AR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
